notes: Substitution applied: upstream loads its donate dataset from a hardcoded local libname (libname mylib '/home/zengpen/datasets'; set mylib.donate;) pointing at a machine outside the repo; datasets/donate.sas7bdat exists in-repo but is a binary SAS7BDAT we can't read directly. Recreated a 6-row donate dataset inline via DATALINES with the same shape (ID, Qtr1-Qtr4) the rest of the script expects. Everything from 'proc contents' onward is byte-identical to the original: ARRAY-based percentage/difference/goal/rotate calculations.
